title: Asking for Directions

segments.text: Excuse me, how do I get to the train station?
Go straight for two blocks, then turn left at the bank.
The station is on your right.

transcript: Excuse me, how do I get to the train station? Go straight for two blocks, then turn left at the bank. The station is on your right. Is it far? About a ten-minute walk. Thank you so much. You're welcome.
